description_long: This is a small, round muffin with a golden-brown base and a generous swirl of creamy white frosting on top. The frosting is decorated with colorful candy-coated chocolate pieces in shades of yellow, orange, and brown, giving it a playful and appetizing appearance. The muffin base appears soft and slightly textured, typical of a freshly baked cake. The frosting is piped in a spiral pattern, creating a visually appealing, voluminous peak. There is no visible wrapper, exposing the muffin's slightly uneven, rustic sides. The object is isolated against a plain background, with no visible plate or support.
description: A golden-brown muffin topped with swirled white frosting and colorful candy pieces, with no visible wrapper or plate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's swirled frosting and a cluster of orange and yellow candy pieces prominently on top.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the thick swirl of frosting and a mix of yellow, orange, and brown candies, with the muffin base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays more of the brown and yellow candies, with the frosting's spiral pattern and the muffin's textured base.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizes the arrangement of yellow and orange candies on the frosting's peak, with the muffin base mostly hidden.
attribute_topping_type: candy-coated chocolate pieces (similar to M&M's or Smarties)
